---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how this fits Inzibat's design as a lightweight config-driven mock/proxy server.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, code examples, or configuration snippets about the feature request here.
